scripts.server: bun run pack:gen && bun run packages/server/src/index.ts
scripts.build:frontend: bun run pack:gen && bun run ./build.ts && bun run docs:build
scripts.build:debug: bun run pack:gen && BUNDU_DEBUG=1 bun run ./build.ts
scripts.client: bun run build && bun run serve-frontend
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit && bun run --cwd packages/figma-squircle-merge typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/figma-texture-export typecheck
scripts.validate:packs: bun run pack:gen && bun run scripts/validate-packs.ts
scripts.test:integration: bun run pack:gen && bun run scripts/ci/websocket-smoke.ts
